channel.title: GraphiQuestor – India Intelligence Feed
channel.description: Institutional-grade macro telemetry for India: RBI liquidity, MoSPI real-time CPI/IIP, and fiscal stress monitor.

item.title: India Macro Pulse Dashboard
item.description: MoSPI Industrial Production, CPI, and Credit creation velocity data.

item.title: India Fiscal Stress Monitor
item.description: Tracking Interest Payments as % of Revenue Receipts for sovereign sustainability.

item.title: India Market Pulse Terminal
item.description: Market microstructure, liquidity, and FII/DII flow tracking.
